cars.name: Yangwang U9 Xtreme
cars.headline: World's fastest production car (308.4 mph, Papenburg). Formerly 'U9 Track Edition'.

cars.headline: FLAG: production status unconfirmed / borderline SUV-GT. Raw-hp view only.

cars.headline: Validation prototype at Goodwood 2026; deliveries H2 2027. Most powerful V12 road car.

cars.headline: Hardcore track Jesko. Confirm exact hp and wiki anchor.

cars.name: Koenigsegg Chimera

cars.name: De Tomaso P72
cars.headline: Retro coachbuilt; long-delayed, now entering production.

cars.headline: More usable sibling to the T.50.

cars.headline: First road car to top 200 mph.

cars.name: Jaguar XJ220
cars.headline: Fastest production car in the world, 1992.

cars.name: McLaren Elva

cars.name: Ferrari Monza SP1
cars.headline: Icona-series speedster (SP2 is the two-seat version).

cars.name: Lamborghini Essenza SCV12
cars.headline: Most powerful NA V12 Lamborghini has built.

cars.name: Koenigsegg CC850
cars.headline: Engager gearbox — manual feel with automatic capability.

cars.name: Bugatti La Voiture Noire
cars.headline: One-off; among the most expensive new cars ever sold.

cars.name: McMurtry Spéirling PURE
